message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor Admin
actor Customer
boundary "Games Interface" as GI
boundary "Games Input Interface" as GII
control "Games Controller" as GC
database "Database" as DB

Admin -> GI : CRUD games
GI -> GII : Input games info
GII -> GC : Send CRUD request to server
GC -> DB : Query request to DB
DB --> GC : Response

alt [success case]
    GC --> GII : CRUD successfully
else [fail case]
    GC --> GII : CRUD fail
end

GII --> Admin : Show notification
Admin -> GI : View Game
GI -> GC : FETCH game from server
GC -> DB : Query games
DB --> GC : Games data
GC --> GI : Games data
GI --> Admin : Show all games

@enduml
```
